status: Deployed to Vercel. Link shared with parents. Ready for Fahim's phone review and refinement tweaks.

dev_server.known_issue: Sections use .scroll-reveal (opacity:0). Run in console: document.querySelectorAll('.scroll-reveal').forEach(el => el.classList.add('revealed'));
dev_server.launch_json_note: preview_start does NOT work on Windows — use Bash: npm run dev -- --port 4322 --host

what_each_component_does.Nav.astro: Fixed nav bar. Text-only (no logo). 'Creative Labs Learning Center' left, 'Spring Fiesta' badge right. Backdrop-blur on scroll via JS.
what_each_component_does.Hero.astro: REBUILT with Hero 15 pattern. Cycling background stills (5 photos, 4s interval). Left: headline + date/time + tagline + CTA. Right: video preview card (hero-highlight.mp4). Uses Starwind Button component.
what_each_component_does.EventDetails.astro: Three-column grid (Date, Time, Location) with corner marks and yellow dividers. Custom-built.
what_each_component_does.FreeTickets.astro: Hot pink full-bleed section. Giant '2 FREE TICKETS' with Popsicle/Bull Ride redeem cards. Custom-built.
what_each_component_does.FoodActivities.astro: Starwind Feature 15 bento grid. Elote King spotlight card + Bull Ride card (with photos) + 4 icon/text cards. Imports from @/components/starwind-pro/feature-15/.
what_each_component_does.PhotoStrip.astro: NEW. Horizontal scroll photo cards (8 cards). Custom-built using Services 7 pattern but with native tags (Starwind Image can't handle /public/ paths). Nav arrows. Cards bleed right.
what_each_component_does.LocationParking.astro: FIND US section. Standalone event photo + two-column grid (Location card with Maps link + Parking card). Custom-built.
what_each_component_does.PartnerBanner.astro: Starwind CTA 06. Background photo (squad_with_food.jpg) with Elote King partnership text + View Menu button. CSS overrides for text-shadow and button size.
what_each_component_does.Footer.astro: Text-only footer. Diamond divider, brand name, tagline, address. No logos.

starwind_pro.gotcha: Starwind Image component uses astro:assets — can NOT handle /public/ string paths. Use native for public/ images.

critical_rules.photo_quality: Every photo focused on people — checked all 18 images visually
critical_rules.reference_site: tonyrobbins.com — hero split + horizontal photo strip pattern matched

event_copy.activities: Mechanical bull, popsicles, music, family fun
event_copy.tagline: One night. All the energy. All the flavor.

deploy_workflow.commit_push: git add -A && git commit -m 'description' && git push
deploy_workflow.vercel: Auto-deploys on push to main (GitHub connected to Vercel)

other_context_files.refine_context: .claude/refine-context.json — image paths, video paths, design constraints
